scripts.test: pnpm --filter @rovy/core test && pnpm --filter @rovy/networking test && pnpm --filter @rovy/ui test && pnpm --filter @rovy/datastore test && pnpm --filter rovy-transformer test && pnpm --filter rovy-build test
scripts.pack:local: pnpm --filter @rovy/core build && pnpm --filter @rovy/networking build && pnpm --filter @rovy/ui build && pnpm --filter @rovy/world-inspector build && pnpm --filter @rovy/datastore build && pnpm --filter rovy-transformer build && pnpm --filter rovy-build build && mkdir -p build && find build -maxdepth 1 -name '*.tgz' -delete && for pkg in packages/jecs packages/core packages/networking packages/ui packages/world-inspector packages/datastore packages/transformer packages/build; do pnpm --dir "$pkg" pack --pack-destination "$PWD/build" >/dev/null; done
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter rovy-transformer build && pnpm --filter @rovy/core build && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-gameclock build && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-game test:output && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-game test:luau && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-game test:place
scripts.test:template: pnpm run build:template && pnpm --filter @rovy/game-template lint && pnpm --filter @rovy/game-template test:luau && pnpm --filter @rovy/game-template test:roblox
scripts.test:ui-inventory: pnpm run build:ui-inventory && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-ui-inventory-game test:output && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-ui-inventory-game test:luau && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-ui-inventory-game test:place
scripts.test:zombie: pnpm run build:zombie && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-zombie-game test:output && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-zombie-game test:luau && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-zombie-game test:place
scripts.test:tower: pnpm run build:tower && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-tower-defense-game test:output && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-tower-defense-game test:luau && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-tower-defense-game test:place
scripts.test:multiplace: pnpm run build:multiplace && pnpm --filter @rovy/multiplace-template test:output && pnpm --filter @rovy/multiplace-template test:place
scripts.test:roblox:examples: pnpm --filter @rovy/example-game test:roblox && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-tower-defense-game test:roblox && pnpm --filter @rovy/example-zombie-game test:roblox && pnpm --filter @rovy/multiplace-template test:roblox
scripts.build:examples: pnpm run build:example && pnpm run build:ui-inventory && pnpm run build:ui-test && pnpm run build:zombie && pnpm run build:tower
